sections.label: Verse 1
lines: A hong pai Pasian’ Tapa, Ama min “Dahna Thuaka,”

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Maizumna a hong Thuakpa, Kei tang mawhsakna
A si tawh kei hong Leipa,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: cimawh a, Amah’n mawhna nei lo a,

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Si dinga hong kikhai pa, “Ka zozo” ci-a Awngpa,

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Hih lathak e’n i sa ding, Hallelujah! Hong Honpa hi.
